description.unified: Heals HP of all allies by ??? and increases Heal Rate by 25% for 10 sec, [increases Magic Block Chance by 300 for 4 sec->reduces M.DMG they take by 15% for 5 sec]. If the target's HP is below 50%, [healing->Heal Rate] and [ (added) the amount of reduced M.DMG the target takes] increases by x 1.5.

For 15 sec, casts a shield that blocks ??? DMG on the ally with the lowest HP. While the shield is in effect, it grants Immunity to CC, increases the ATK by ??? , and heals ??? HP every sec for the ally. For 15 sec, the ally takes [15%->30%] reduced DMG from Non-Hero targets and increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 15%. The DMG Reduction effect and the DMG Boost effect to Non-Hero enemies are irremovable.

Deals M.DMG to nearby enemies and knocks them down for [1.8 sec->3 sec]. Upon casting, heals HP of all allies by 15% of their Max HP and recovers [ (added) 2 orbs of] Mana excluding self [(removed) recovery per second by 30%]. Afterwards, for 12 sec, creates a whirlpool every 4 sec that deals M.DMG to random enemies and knocks them down for [1.2 sec->2 sec].

Increases Laias's CC Resist by 500, and all allies' M.DEF is increased by ??? + 5% of Laias's M.DEF, and M.Crit Resistance by 250. [(added) Whenever Laias casts an active Skill, reduces M.DMG all allies take by 25% for 5 sec.]

light.unified: M.DEF increase rate increases by [40%->20%], and M. Crit Resistance increases by [100->150].

dark.unified: The DMG Reduction effect becomes irremovable.

description.unified: [Festival of the Flow] Whirlpool effect targets 2 enemies and all allies recover additional {0} mana.
Increases the [Healing->Heal Rate] of all allies by {0}% and M.DEF by 5% of Laias' ATK. Every 5 sec, heals the ally with the lowest HP by {1}% of own ATK.
Dispels negative effects from self and allies and summons the soul of Flowing Circle, Eltoirre for 12 sec, healing all allies' HP by [120% of ATK->] and Mana by [40->400] every sec.
